song_name: Taylor Swift - Youre On Your Own Kid - I Can Do It With A Broken Heart
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Standard Tuning
No capo

Play along >
https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=LS9OnHOyBTU

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Summer went away, still, the yearning stays[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
I play it cool with the best of them[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I wait patiently, he's gonna notice me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]                                 [ch]Db[/ch]
It's okay, we're the best of friends[/tab]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I hear it in your voice, you're smoking with your boys[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
I touch my phone as if it's your face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I didn't choose this town, I dream of getting out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
There's just one who could make me stay[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                                  [ch]Gb[/ch]
From sprinkler splashes to fireplace ashes[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Db[/ch]
I waited ages to see you there[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I search the party of better bodies[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Just to learn that you never cared[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
But that life was too short[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Gb[/ch]
Breaking down I hit the floor[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
All the pieces of me shattered[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Db[/ch]
As the crowd was chanting "MORE!"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I was grinning like I'm winning[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Ab[/ch]
I was hitting my marks[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Db[/ch]
Cause I can do it with a broken heart.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                                    [ch]Gb[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'm so depressed I act like it's my birthday[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Db[/ch]
Every day[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Gb[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'm so obsessed with him but he avoids me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Db[/ch]
Like the plague[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Gb[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
I cry a lot but I am so productive[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]
It's an art[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Gb[/ch]              [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
You know you're good when you can even do it with a broken heart[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I see the great escape, so long, Daisy May[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]                               [ch]Db[/ch]
I picked the petals, he loves me not[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Something different bloomed, writing in my room[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
I play my songs in the parking lot[/tab]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I keep finding his things in drawers[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gb[/ch]
Crucial evidence I didn't imagine the whole thing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                       [ch]Gb[/ch]
I'm sure I can pass this test[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
I'll run away
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                                  [ch]Gb[/ch]
From sprinkler splashes to fireplace ashes[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Db[/ch]
I called a taxi to take me there[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I search the party of better bodies[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Just to learn that my dreams aren't rare[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
But that time was quite short[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Gb[/ch]
Breaking down I hit the floor[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
All the pieces of me shattered[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Db[/ch]
As the crowd was chanting "MORE!"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I was grinning like I'm winning[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Ab[/ch]
I was hitting my marks[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Db[/ch]
Cause I can do it with a broken heart[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
From sprinkler splashes to fireplace ashes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Gb[/ch]        [ch]Ab[/ch]                   [ch]Db[/ch]
I gave my blood, sweat, and tears for this[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Gb[/ch]
I hosted parties and starved my body[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]                 [ch]Db[/ch]
Like I'd be saved by a perfect kiss[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]Gb[/ch]
The jokes weren't funny, I took the money[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Ab[/ch]                      [ch]Db[/ch]
My friends from home don't know what to say[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]Gb[/ch]
I looked around in a blood-soaked gown[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ab[/ch]                      [ch]Db[/ch]
And I saw something they can't take away[/tab]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                                              [ch]Gb[/ch]
'Cause there were pages turned with the bridges burned[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Ab[/ch]
Everything you lose is a step you take[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                                                    [ch]Gb[/ch]
So make the friendship bracelets, take the moment and taste it[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
You've got no reason to be afraid[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]                    [ch]Db[/ch]
You're on your own, kid (ah)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Cause I'm MISERABLE![/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
Yeah, you can face this (ah)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gb[/ch]
And nobody even knows![/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
You're on your own, kid[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Ab[/ch]
You always have been[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
Try and come for my job.[/tab]
